PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>

  wd:Q212135 wdt:P577 ?airingDate .
  wd:Q182253 wdt:P577 ?preShowDate .
  FILTER(?preShowDate < ?airingDate)
  .
  ?show wdt:P577 ?preShowDate
}
